landing.title: Fresh booking workflows for growing service businesses.
landing.description: A multi-tenant booking and subscription platform foundation built with Next.js, Prisma, MongoDB, NextAuth, Stripe, React Query, Formik, Yup, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui.
landing.featureDescription: ServiceFlow is structured around business ownership, plan limits, and customer-facing booking journeys.
